title: Lesson Quiz: Purpose of a Career Portfolio
description: Assessment of the concept that Why portfolios matter.

questions.prompt: What is the main purpose of a career portfolio?

choices.text: To show evidence of skills, achievements, and readiness
choices.feedback: Correct. A career portfolio is meant to present evidence that shows a student's growth, skills, and readiness.

choices.text: To include every paper a student has ever completed
choices.feedback: A strong portfolio is selective, not a collection of every assignment.
A portfolio should help explain and highlight important accomplishments.

choices.text: To replace all future job applications
choices.feedback: A portfolio can support applications, but it does not replace them.

questions.prompt: A career portfolio can help a student communicate strengths and growth to others.

choices.feedback: A portfolio is useful because it helps show strengths, growth, and readiness clearly.
Correct. A career portfolio can show what a student has done and what the student is prepared to do next.

questions.prompt: Why is it helpful to select portfolio items with a clear purpose?

choices.text: So the portfolio can stay random
choices.feedback: A portfolio should be purposeful, not random.

choices.text: So the reviewer has no idea what the student wants to show
choices.feedback: A strong portfolio should make the student's purpose clear.

choices.text: So the portfolio shows evidence that matches the student's goals and strengths
choices.feedback: Correct. A clear purpose helps a student choose evidence that supports goals, strengths, and readiness.

choices.text: So the student can avoid organizing anything
choices.feedback: Purpose and organization work together in a strong portfolio.

questions.prompt: A student wants to show leadership and responsibility. Which portfolio item would best support that goal?

choices.text: An unlabeled page with no explanation
choices.feedback: Portfolio items should be meaningful and clearly connected to the student's purpose.
Items should provide evidence of the student's own skills or accomplishments.

choices.text: A random worksheet with no connection to leadership
choices.feedback: The best portfolio item should clearly support the skill or quality being highlighted.

choices.text: A certificate from leading a club project with a short reflection
choices.feedback: Correct. This item provides direct evidence of leadership and adds context through reflection.

questions.prompt: The purpose of a career portfolio is only to collect documents, not to show readiness.

choices.feedback: A portfolio is more than storage. It should help show readiness, strengths, and achievement.
Correct. A career portfolio should be purposeful and should help demonstrate readiness.
